POST /accounts/{account_id}/agent-memory.description: Retrieves memories relevant to the query and returns a synthesized answer.

query.description: Natural-language query to match against stored memories.

referenceDate.description: Temporal anchor for relative date references in the query.

responseLength.description: Verbosity of the synthesized answer. Defaults to 'medium'.

thinkingLevel.description: Recall intensity / search depth. Defaults to 'low'.

answer.description: LLM-synthesized answer to the query. Omitted when synthesis is skipped.
answer.example: You prefer dark mode in the dashboard.

candidates.description: Matching memories ranked by relevance (most relevant first).

score.description: Relevance score for the query; higher is more relevant.

sessionId.description: Session the candidate memory is associated with, or null if not session-scoped.

summary.description: Short summary of the candidate memory.
summary.example: User prefers dark mode in the dashboard.

count.description: Number of matching memories returned in `candidates`.
